dashboard.title: Player Hub
dashboard.noTeamDesc: Once you're on a team, your fixtures appear here automatically.
dashboard.noSquadDesc: When you join a team, your teammates will appear here.
dashboard.playFirstMatch: Play your first match to unlock rating trends and career stats.

registration.title: Competition Registration
registration.guardianNote: This player is under 18. A parent or guardian must provide consent before registration is complete.
registration.imageRights: I confirm the parent/guardian grants image and video rights for this player to appear in official match coverage.
registration.dataConsent: I confirm the parent/guardian consents to this player's personal data being processed for league administration purposes.

consent.title: Parental Consent Required
consent.intro: You have been asked to provide parental or guardian consent for the following player registration.
consent.imageRightsDesc: I grant permission for photos and videos of this player to be used in official match coverage, social media, and league publications.
consent.dataConsentDesc: I consent to this player's personal data (name, date of birth, contact information) being processed by the league for administration purposes in accordance with GDPR.
consent.success: Consent granted. The player's registration is now complete.
consent.alreadyGranted: Consent has already been granted for this registration.
consent.expired: This consent link has expired or is invalid.
